case_title: COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC., VS. JAMES GURDOCK et al

docket_entries.description: COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,787.96 INTEREST, $184.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION NOV-18-2014 DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PER LOCAL RULE 8.9 (E)AS TO JAMES GURDOCK. NO APPEARANCE, NOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE SACOR FINANCIAL, INC.
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT GURDOCK, JAMES DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED, EXCEPT AS TO REQUEST FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES IS DENIED AS THEY ARE NOT PROVIDED FOR IN THE CONTRACT OR BY STATUTE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS --
PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED, EXCEPT AS TO REQUEST FOR AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES IS DENIED AS THEY ARE NOT PROVIDED FOR IN THE CONTRACT OR BY STATUTE. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558. (301/JLW)
